claim: GlobalTech Corp transferred 240 employees to a new subsidiary and 400 accepted voluntary separation packages in Q3 2023.

corpus.title: GlobalTech Corp — SEC Form 10-Q (Q3 2023)
corpus.source: U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission EDGAR
corpus.snippet: GlobalTech Corp transferred 800 employees to a new subsidiary and 400 accepted voluntary separation packages in Q3 2023....
corpus.content:
GLOBALTECH CORP — QUARTERLY REPORT (FORM 10-Q)
Period: Quarter ended September 30, 2023
Filed: October 30, 2023

NOTE 7 — WORKFORCE RESTRUCTURING
In Q3 2023, the Company completed a restructuring of its legacy Infrastructure Services division. A total of 800 employees were transferred to GlobalTech Infrastructure LLC, a newly formed wholly-owned subsidiary. An additional 400 employees elected voluntary separation under the Company's Early Transition Program, receiving severance packages averaging 18 weeks of compensation.

Revenue for Q3 2023: $1.87B (+3.1% year-over-year).
No involuntary terminations occurred in connection with this restructuring.

corpus.snippet: GlobalTech Corp transferred 800 employees to a new subsidiary and 400 accepted voluntary separation ...
corpus.content:
Breaking: GlobalTech Corp makes a significant move amid changes in the corporate sector

GlobalTech Corp transferred 800 employees to a new subsidiary and 400 accepted voluntary separation packages in Q3 2023. According to sources familiar with the matter, the decision follows months of internal deliberation. Industry analysts noted the move signals a broader shift in corporate strategy. A spokesperson for GlobalTech Corp declined to comment beyond the official statement.
